name: New error code
about: Report a MyInvois error code that isn't in the cookbook yet
title: "[ERROR] "
labels: error-code, enhancement

---

## Error code
<!-- e.g. CF421, DS340, Error08. Include the full code as MyInvois returned it. -->



## Full error response
<!-- Paste the error response body, REDACTED of any real TINs / personal data.
     Both English (`error` field) and Malay (`errorMS` field) if available. -->

```json

```

## What triggered it
<!-- What was your submission doing? Was it a specific document type,
     a specific field value, a specific action (submit/cancel/reject)? -->



## Remediation (how you fixed it)
<!-- Concrete steps. Prefer "change X to Y" over "the field was wrong". -->



## When you encountered it
<!-- Month + year. LHDN adds validation rules over time and the code may
     not have existed in earlier months. -->

- Month/Year:
- Environment: <!-- Production / Sandbox -->
- MyInvois System version (if known):

## Correlation ID (optional)
<!-- If you have the correlationId response header from the failed request,
     paste it here. Helps if LHDN needs to trace the issue. -->



## Source of this info
<!-- How do you know this is right? "I encountered it in production",
     "A LHDN support ticket confirmed", "Community member X reported". -->
